calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance.
Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $100 per pay period. Any earnings held by the levying officer shall be released to the judgment creditor is off calendar, default judgment has been set aside. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Corine Jackson, 415-355-2861 or 469-7741, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona.
Michael Mahoney, Esq., 415-693-9361 for plaintiff and opposing party WFS Financial, Inc.

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court took UNDER SUBMISSION DEFENDANT CORINE JACKSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Counsel for plaintiff shall submit proposed forms of order. (301/JLW/DS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Continued To Oct-20-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is continued to October 20, 2005 at 9:00 am. in Dept. 612. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Corine Jackson, 415-469-7741 defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
DEFENDANT CORINE JACKSON' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR FAILURE TO INCLUDE COPY OF PROPOSED ANSWER WITH PLEADINGS. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DM)
